modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to locate online training materials for Purchasing procedures.

full_description_text: The user is seeking access to online training resources related to Purchasing procedures. They are unsure of where to find these materials. This issue may hinder their ability to complete procurement tasks effectively.
